text: MarketReel — Global Film DistributionAvengers: EndgameMarketing Campaign Strategy BriefMarketReel Intelligence Document 2019 Global Release StrategyStrategic OverviewTitleAvengers: EndgameRelease StrategyWide global day-and-date theatrical releaseRecommended WindowApril–May (Summer pre-season)OTT StrategyDisney exclusive post-theatrical (90-day window); Bundled as MCU saga marathon contentEstimated Marketing Spend215M USD (all territories)Target Audience SegmentsMCU fans (primary)General action audiencesFamiliesYoung adults 18-35Core Marketing HooksThe following narrative hooks have been identified as the film's primary marketing levers:'The finale of a generation'10-year culmination angleTony Stark legacy marketingEvery hero returns — nostalgia playTerritory Marketing Spend & StrategyTerritoryBudget (USD)Strategy NotesNorth America85MSaturation TV/digital; IMAX premium pushChina40MWeChat/Weibo campaigns; localized poster art; fan event premieresUK & Europe30MFestival-adjacent press tour; streaming platform cross-promoJapan/South Korea20MCharacter-specific campaigns; pop-up merchandise eventsIndia15MHindi/Tamil dubbed versions; regional star tie-insLatin America10MSpanish dub focus; social media influencer partnershipsMiddle East8MFamily-safe cut promotion; mall theatrical partnershipsAustralia/NZ7MBundled with Disney launch promotionRelease Window RationaleRecommended theatrical release window: April–May (Summer pre-season)This window has been selected based on competitive landscape analysis, historical box office performance for this genre in target territories, award season positioning requirements, and OTT platform licensing timeline needs.Digital & OTT StrategyDisney exclusive post-theatrical (90-day window); Bundled as MCU saga marathon contentDigital marketing investment should be weighted toward territories with high mobile-first media consumption (India, Southeast Asia, Latin America, Africa). Social media platform prioritization: TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube for 18-34; Facebook, YouTube for 35; WeChat, Weibo, Douyin for China-region.PR & Talent StrategyPrincipal cast: Robert Downey Jr., Chris Evans, Scarlett Johansson, Mark Ruffalo, Chris Hemsworth, Josh BrolinPress tour sequencing recommendation: Begin with home-market press junket (North America/UK), followed by sequential territory visits prioritized by theatrical revenue projection. Virtual press events are recommended for long-tail territory coverage. Influencer partnerships should be activated 4 weeks prior to theatrical release date in each territory.Awards Campaign NotesIf this title is positioned for awards consideration, the following additional investments are recommended: screener distribution to eligible voters (Academy, BAFTA, HFPA), FYC advertising in trade publications (Variety, Hollywood Reporter, Screen International), and targeted awards-season theatrical runs in qualifying markets (Los Angeles, New York, London minimum).MarketReel Confidential — Avengers: Endgame Marketing Strategy — For Internal Distribution Use Only
